title: E-Waste Management Lifecycle
description: A flowchart illustrating the key stages and responsible actors in the e-waste management process, from consumer disposal to final recycling or disposal, as informed by the principles of responsible e-waste management.
relationships: Consumer discards e-waste to Collection Center
Collection Center sorts and sends to Dismantling Facility
Dismantling Facility separates components for Recycling Unit
Recycling Unit processes materials for Reclaimed Materials Market
Non-recyclable residuals are sent to a secured Landfill
